args.code: (() => { const errors = []; window.onerror = (msg, url, line, col, err) => { errors.push({msg, url, line, col, stack: err?.stack}); return false; }; window.addEventListener("error", (e) => { errors.push({type: "error", msg: e.message, filename: e.filename, lineno: e.lineno, colno: e.colno, error: e.error?.stack}); }); window.addEventListener("unhandledrejection", (e) => { errors.push({type: "unhandledrejection", reason: String(e.reason), stack: e.reason?.stack}); }); const root = document.getElementById("root"); return JSON.stringify({ rootHtml: root?.innerHTML?.substring(0,200), errors: errors.slice(-5), reactRoot: !!root?._reactRootContainer, scripts: Array.from(document.scripts).map(s => s.src).filter(Boolean) }); })()
